response.overview: Ernie LaPointe, a Native American from the Lakota tribe, a Vietnam veteran, and the great-grandson of the legendary chief Sitting Bull — he is the man I meet. It all begins with a strange vision my mother had. What follows is a road trip through South Dakota where, between Trump-supporting casino towns and the sacred sites of Native American spirituality, Ernie shares with me the thoughts, memories, and values passed down from his ancestors.
response.title: Still Looking for Sitting Bull
